description: Detects potential memory/goroutine leak patterns in Go: goroutines launched inside loops. JSON version matches for_statement containing statement_list containing go_statement. Languages field scoped to go only to avoid conflict with Rust memory_leak_indicators pipeline (same pipeline name). Go grammar wraps block contents in statement_list node. JSON cannot detect unbounded append or defer-in-loop without additional patterns.

flag.message: goroutine launched inside loop -- may cause goroutine leak or unbounded concurrency
